subject: Crabrawler, a crab-like fighting Pokemon with large raised claws in a combat stance on a tropical beach
description: A compact crab creature stands in an aggressive, ready-to-fight pose with both large claws raised. Its body is predominantly blue and purple with a sturdy, armored shell. The claws are large relative to its body and clearly held up in a boxer's guard or combat display. The setting is a tropical beach: warm sandy ground underfoot, palm trees in the background, and a bright sky. The image has vivid, saturated colors — deep blues and purples on the creature against warm sandy and sky tones in the background. The mood is energetic and combative.
foreground: Crabrawler with claws raised in combat stance
background: tropical beach, palm trees, bright sky
